# Summit Auto Group
> Colorado's trusted source for quality used & certified pre-owned vehicles

## NAP
- Name: Summit Auto Group
- Address: 4820 Federal Blvd, Denver, CO 80221
- Phone: (303) 555-0142
- Email: sales@summitautogroup.example

## Hours
Mon–Sat 9:00am–7:00pm · Sun 10:00am–5:00pm

## Domain
https://summitautogroup.example

## Description
Summit Auto Group is a family-owned Denver dealership offering hand-picked used cars, certified pre-owned vehicles, transparent in-house financing, and a full-service maintenance department for every make and model.

## Owner
Marcus Delgado

## Payment Accepted
Cash, Credit Card, Financing, Trade-In

## Year Established
2009
